title: CEH-Ethical-Hacking Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level CEH-Ethical-Hacking certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
Describe time you designed high-availability architecture
